# Application Endpoint Group (EPG)

## Get EPGs' domain properties

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_epg.view_domain:iserver.output.default
```

Use '--pivot' option to get the domain specific output

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_epg.view_domain_pivot:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_epg.view_domain:devel.debug
```
